zh.lifeSummary: 當Curtis Land III於1702年12月1日出生在美國維吉尼亞州素可阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什時，他的父親Curtis Land34歲，母親Mary Williamson33歲。他於1731年與Priscilla K Bird在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1783年5月15日在美國維吉尼亞州素可享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Curtis Land III于1702年12月1日出生在美国弗吉尼亚州素可阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什时，他的父亲Curtis Land34岁，母亲Mary Williamson33岁。他于1731年与Priscilla K Bird在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1783年5月15日在美国弗吉尼亚州素可享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Land
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: topographic name from Old English, Middle Dutch land, Middle High German lant ‘land, territory’. This had more specialized senses in the Middle Ages, being used to denote the countryside as opposed to a town or an estate.
English: topographic name from Middle English launde ‘glade’ (Old French land), or a habitational name from a place called with this word, such as Launde in Leicestershire or Laund in Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of the three farmsteads so named, from Old Norse land ‘land, territory’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lander
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic or status name from Middle High German lant, German Land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 1). Compare Landmann .
German: topographic name from Middle High German lander ‘picket fence’.
German: from the personal name Lanther, see Landherr 1.

variants.name: Lands
meanings: English: variant of   Land  .

variants.name: Landt
meanings: German: variant of   Land   1.

variants.name: Lande
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads, so named from either the dative singular or the plural form of land (see Land 3).
German: from the old personal name Lando, a short form of ancient Germanic names formed with lant ‘land’ (see Land ).

French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, moor, French lande (from Gaulish landa ‘space, land’), or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called La Lande from this word. Compare Lalande .

variants.name: Landfried
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantel.
South German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements land ‘land, territory’ (see Land ) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).

variants.name: Lawn
meanings: English:
variant of   Land   2.
from Middle English laun ‘lawn, fine linen’ (French laun, from the name of the city of Laon), perhaps for a maker or trader.

variants.name: Landa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Jose, Luis, Juan, Manuel, Enrique, Jesus, Julio, Mario, Roberto, Miguel.

Basque: topographic name from landa ‘(large) field, prairie’. There is a place of this name in Araba/Álava province, Basque Country (Spain), and the surname may also be a habitational name from this place.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southwestern Norway, so named from the plural of land ‘land, territory’ (see Land 3).

variants.name: Lant
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Land   with devoicing of the final consonant.

nameMeanings.name: Curtis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages as a nickname for someone who was ‘courteous’ (Old French curteis). At an early date, however, it came to be associated with Middle English curt ‘short’ + hose ‘leggings’ compare Courtney .

variants.name: Kurtis
meanings: Respelling of   Curtis  , influenced by   Kurt  , to which, however, it is not related.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Richmond Becomes the Capital
historicEvents.description: On April 18, 1780 Richmond became the capital of Virginia. It was the temporary capital from 1780-1788.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History- History of Richmond Virginia

en.lifeSummary: When Curtis Land III was born on 1 December 1702, in Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, United States, his father, Curtis Land, was 34 and his mother, Mary Williamson, was 33. He married Priscilla K Bird in 1731, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 15 May 1783, in Sussex, Virginia, United States, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Curtis Land III est né le 1 décembre 1702, à Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Curtis Land, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mary Williamson, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Priscilla K Bird en 1731, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1783, à Sussex, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Curtis Land III am 1. Dezember 1702 in Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Curtis Land 34 und seine Mutter Mary Williamson 33. Er hat 1731 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Priscilla K Bird geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1783 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Sussex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land III è nato il il 1 dicembre 1702 nel Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Curtis Land, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mary Williamson, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Priscilla K Bird nel 1731, nel Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1783, nel Sussex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Curtis Land IIIが1702年12月1日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スセックスアルベマルル パーイッシュで生まれた時，父Curtis Landは34歳，母Mary Williamsonは33歳であった。1731年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州でPriscilla K Birdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1783年5月15日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スセックスで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Curtis Land III(이)가 1702년 12월 1일 미국 버지니아 주 수세스 알브마일 파리시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Curtis Land(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Williamson(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1731년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Priscilla K Bird(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1783년 5월 15일 미국 버지니아 주 수세스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Curtis Land III nasceu em 1 de dezembro de 1702, em Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Curtis Land, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mary Williamson, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Priscilla K Bird em 1731, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1783, em Sussex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Curtis Land III родился 1 декабря 1702 г. в местности альбемарл пэриш, суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Curtis Land было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Williamson, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Priscilla K Bird в 1731 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 15 мая 1783 г. в местности суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Curtis Land III nació el 1 de diciembre de 1702, en Albemarle Parish, Sussex, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Curtis Land, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mary Williamson, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Priscilla K Bird en 1731, en Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1783, en Sussex, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 80 años.
